basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.annauniv.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class in M.E. / M. Tech. in Engineering or Technology(Civil / Structural / Construction Engineering and Management) from a recognized University or Equivalent.
qualification.details: Project Assistant: First Class in M.E. / M. Tech. in Engineering or Technology(Civil / Structural / Construction Engineering and Management) from a recognized University or Equivalent.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Project Assistant post at Anna University is 23rd May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have secured a First Class in M.E. / M. Tech. in Engineering or Technology, specifically in Civil / Structural / Construction Engineering and Management, from a recognized university or equivalent.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position as per the released notification from Anna University.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for the PROJECT ASSISTANT post at Anna University is to be submitted via email. Detailed instructions are provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant role will involve a written test followed by an interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q7. Where is Anna University located?
faq.answer: Anna University is located in Tamil Nadu. The specific department for this recruitment is the Department of Civil Engineering, University College of Engineering Panruti, Panruti - 607 106.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for confirmation.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment of Project Assistant at Anna University is CMRG/eOffice E-671131/115.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with a Master's degree in other engineering fields apply?
faq.answer: No, the eligibility criteria specifically mention M.E. / M. Tech. in Engineering or Technology with a specialization in Civil / Structural / Construction Engineering and Management. Other fields are not mentioned.
